title: astragalus famelicus
intro: Astragalus famelicus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species within the Astragalus genus. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which enable the body to cope with stress and fight off infections. The plant contains various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids that contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Astragalus famelicus is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule to utilize its health benefits, which include boosting the immune system, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing fatigue.
